title: What Scripture actually says about self-control (it's not what you think)
caption:
Most men are fighting the wrong battle.

You can't out-discipline an empty root. Willpower runs out — Paul knew it. That's why he doesn't list self-control as a hustle. He lists it as fruit. Fruit doesn't come from flexing; it grows from what you're rooted in.

The man who gets this stops trying to white-knuckle his way to freedom and starts asking the harder question: what am I actually rooted in? What gets my mornings? What shapes what I want?

Galatians 5:22–23 doesn't describe a man who finally figured out the right system. It describes a man the Spirit has had hold of long enough to change what he wants.

Get in the Word before anything else gets in your head. Confess what you've been managing instead of killing. Stay rooted.

The fruit follows.

—

Comment "fruit" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

#ethos #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #selfdiscipline #galatians #faithoverfear #discipleship #christianmasculinity
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
